'''chanaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nicknacket|nicknacket]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-n-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nicknacket|nicknacket]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chanaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chænækæth|chænækæth]] || [[word:chænækæj|chænækæj]] || [[word:chænækæsh|chænækæsh]] || [[word:chænækæ|chænækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chananakath|chananakath]] || [[word:chananakaj|chananakaj]] || [[word:chananakash|chananakash]] || [[word:chananaka|chananaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chanakath|chanakath]] || [[word:chanakaj|chanakaj]] || [[word:chanakash|chanakash]] || [[word:chanaka|chanaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chanafkath|chanafkath]] || [[word:chanafkaj|chanafkaj]] || [[word:chanafkash|chanafkash]] || [[word:chanafkaf|chanafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chanakatha|chanakatha]] || [[word:chanakaja|chanakaja]] || [[word:chanakasha|chanakasha]] || [[word:chanakaka|chanakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chanakath|chanakath]] || [[word:chanakaj|chanakaj]] || [[word:chanakash|chanakash]] || [[word:chanaka|chanaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chanakathal|chanakathal]] || [[word:chanakajal|chanakajal]] || [[word:chanakashal|chanakashal]] || [[word:chanakakal|chanakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chanakathatha|chanakathatha]] || [[word:chanakajaja|chanakajaja]] || [[word:chanakashasha|chanakashasha]] || [[word:chanakaka|chanakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chanakathan|chanakathan]] || [[word:chanakajan|chanakajan]] || [[word:chanakashan|chanakashan]] || [[word:chanakakan|chanakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chanakathaoro|chanakathaoro]] || [[word:chanakajaoro|chanakajaoro]] || [[word:chanakashaoro|chanakashaoro]] || [[word:chanakakaoro|chanakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
